notes: All gates passed: npm run typecheck (tsc --noEmit + contracts build), npm run lint (eslint + effect + permissions + state-writes + overdeck-boundaries + skills + prompts + file-size), npx vitest run (src/lib/cloister/__tests__/stuck-remediation.test.ts + src/lib/cloister/__tests__/config.test.ts, 33 tests). Implementation verified: (1) StuckRemediationConfig adds flywheel_stage1_minutes=20, flywheel_stage2_minutes=24, flywheel_stage3_minutes=28 fields with defaults; (2) evaluateFlywheelOrchestrator() switches stage thresholds to config.flywheel_stage{3,2,1}_minutes and rewrites stage-1/2 nudge messages to direct FULL tick + ScheduleWakeup(1000s) instead of pause/status-only; (3) roles/flywheel.md updated with 'full tick' directive and '~28-minute' flywheel-specific relaunch threshold. No browser UAT required (backend-only recovery fix). All acceptance criteria met.
